findings.description: The entire PDF page 1 slide is embedded as a screenshot image in the HTML, while the same audio troubleshooting and welcome content is also rendered as HTML text above it, creating content duplication that disrupts reading flow.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows one slide. HTML page 1 renders the text (AUDIO TROUBLESHOOTING heading, instructions, Welcome to CHPP heading, date, etc.) AND embeds the original slide as an image directly below the extracted text, so a reader encounters the same information twice.
